referential_task.2.player.chat_transcrip: [20:32:16] director: Hello!  [20:32:29] director: Hi!  [20:33:13] director: The first basket is a picnic basket with an open lid  [20:33:19] director: one handle  [20:34:15] director: Let me start by describing the first one.  But first, what is your name?  I just want to know to your name so I can keep track if we are in the next conversation or not.  [20:35:03] director: Well.. Anyways I guess..... let's start then  [20:35:25] director: If you could even give a nickname that isn't your real name that's fine.  [20:35:38] director: Whenever you're ready,  or not  [20:35:42] director: Basket 1  [20:36:12] director: Basket 1 is half open in the middle.  Do you have another basket like this or no?  Like are there 2 or more with this description?  [20:37:12] director: Hello?  You there?  [20:37:33] director: ....  [20:37:40] director: Hello?  [20:39:28] director: Okay... can you please answer because I'm the one describing things which is very laborious and you choose so it's not much effort on your part.  I have already invested in one round so I really want to finish this survey and can't move forward without your input.  [20:41:16] director: The second is akin to a laundry basket with two handles and you can see holes through it. it has a circular and flat bottom.  [20:42:12] director: the third is shiny and a dark brown color, it has a thick ring along the top and rounded sides  [20:42:37] director: it has a singular handle and it is a semi circle  [20:43:50] director: number 4 is a smaller wicker basket and looks more woven than the others, it has one handle that is squarish round  [20:44:14] director: the basket itself is more on the rounder side and more of a uniform color  [20:44:46] director: hi, sorry My page didn't load and I didn't recieve any messages  [20:45:09] director: hello?  [20:45:52] director: Let's work together so we can help the researchers and both be paid.  This task is also kind of interesting and fun.  Want to help me?  [20:47:01] director: If you have some kind of emergency please let me know,  sorry if this is too much.. just want to get started on this so we don't run out of time.  [20:48:50] director: If you can't do this task right now can you please choose any 12 baskets and submit it so I can move forward?  I don't mean to be inconsiderate.. just really need an answer or for you to choose 12 random baskets and submit it if you can..  If you really can't no worries... I'll just have to leave the survey.  [20:56:26] director: Last chance.. if you're a human and not a Bot  [20:56:51] director: Can you please submit any 12 baskets in any order so I can move forward and then you could leave the survey?  [20:57:25] director: I understand if you don't want to do this task.. I understand if there is an emergency.. I guess if you are dealing with that then you can't..  [20:58:17] director: If you are choosing not to help.. I understand depression.. so if you have it I understand. It would really help me to submit the 12.. I could even briefly help you if you need someone to listen  [20:59:37] director: I just want to say if you are not cooperating out of choice and it isn't related to depression or an emergency it is really unfair to me because I can't move forward without you  [20:59:51] director: So I just end up losing $10 I've started to work hard on.  [21:00:01] director: Can you understand that's a shitty situation for me??  [21:00:10] director: Me ?  **  [21:04:02] director: ugh..  if you are a bot, it should be illegal to do this.. I literally was participating in the survey  [21:05:57] director: I'm going to ask the researcher if I can get some form of compensation but if this was out of malice I just want you to know whoever you are, you're a .... a bad thing.  [21:06:18] director: If you're having an emergency I'm truly sorry.  [21:07:13] director: Well..  thank you for nothing.  If you are having a mental health episode you are cared about and please get help if you can.  Take care!!!!!!!!!!
